Copy Forensics

    Copy Forensics

    Uncover every single paste event with Word's own revision metadata—no black-box guesses, just clear evidence of what was pasted.

    0/30000

    Detect Plagiarism with Explainable Analysis

    Our engine parses WordprocessingML revision IDs to pinpoint each paste action. You get exact character spans, raw RSID trails, and an audit-ready report you can defend.

    Sharp-Detection: Identify every one-shot paste at the character level using the document’s internal RSID timestamps.

    Noise-Less: Automatically filter out simple formatting or style edits, leaving pure paste events.

    Audit-Friendly: Export raw XML snippets plus plain-English summaries for each highlight, perfect for appeals and compliance.

    API-Ready: Integrate seamlessly to scan batches of documents, generate reports, and enforce integrity at scale.
